evidence.source_title: Trita Parsi — Stockholm School of Economics
evidence.description: SSE alumni profile describes Trita and his brother coming to Sweden together as children in 1978.

evidence.source_title: The scheming Parsi brothers — modern governmental influencers
evidence.description: Report on the Parsi brothers' respective roles in Iran-related policy influence in the U.S. and Sweden.

editorial_notes: Both brothers came to Sweden from Iran in 1978. Father was a university professor jailed twice under the Shah.
